chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Cr. Jail Appeal No. S- 30 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of MA No.4210 of 24. 2. For hearing of Main case. 11.07.2024. Mr. Oshaque Ali Sangi, Assistant Attorney General for Pakistan Mr. Shewak Rathore, Deputy Prosecutor General, Sindh. ----------- The appellant an Afghan national on conclusion of trial was convicted under section 3/4 r/w Section 14 Foreigner, Act, 1946 and sentenced to undergo rigorous imprisonment for two years, with the benefit of Section 382-B Cr.PC, by learned Additional Sessions Judge, Ratodero, vide judgment dated 13.09.2023, which he impugned before this Court by preferring the instant criminal jail appeal. It is stated by the applicant by way of the listed application that he has completed his jail term, therefore, the authorities be directed to deport him to the country of his origin, which is not opposed by learned D.P.G for the State. Under the given circumstances, the instant appeal having become infructuous is disposed of accordingly, with direction to the Jail Authorities to deport the appellant to the country of his origin within one month, hereinafter, under intimation to this Court. J U D G E S.Ashfaq.
